case_title: JUAN J GUEVARA VS. JOSE BONILLA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, JUAN J AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, JOSE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, JUAN J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONILLA, JOSE $3,033.85 PRINCIPAL, $13.44 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,167.59, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION,INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU AS ASSIGNEE OF RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, JUAN J AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, JOSE
